response:
A


The process described is cellular respiration (the opposite of photosynthesis). Its balanced chemical equation is C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂ → 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + energy (ATP). This directly shows that the inputs/reactants are sugar (glucose) and oxygen, while the outputs/waste products are CO₂ and H₂O. Option A is the only choice that matches these inputs and outputs exactly; all other options reverse or mix up the reactants and products.
